Notice Of Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar May-26-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Ayse Kent, Esq. 415-638-9471 AK Employment Law Office for Plaintiff.
Dominic Signorotti, Esq. 925-433-5445, McKenna Brink Signorotti for Defendant.
Court reporter: Pam Katros, CSR 383, 916-879-0406, kcsr9383@gmail.com, reported.

RULING - A R G U E D. Mr. Signorotti argues, raises 4 issue and cites case law. Ms. Kent responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CSC GENERATION HOLDINGS, INC., TOUCH OF MODERN, LLC's Petition To Compel Arbitration.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Pam Katros, CSR 383, 916-879-0406, kcsr9383@gmail.com, Reported. (302/CK)

***After the hearing, an order denying defendants' petition to comel arbitration is filed. (see scanned order for details)***
